title: valeriana altissima
intro: Valeriana altissima, also known as tall valerian, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the valerian family (Valerianaceae). The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a sedative, anxiolytic, and antispasmodic, making it effective in reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating muscle spasms. The health benefits of Valeriana altissima include improved sleep quality, reduced inflammation, and relief from symptoms of menopause and PMS. Valeriana altissima is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
